baseline.description: Control profile -- no changes from default explore settings

overrides.instruction_fragment: Explore this function systematically. Try all argument type combinations before concluding.
Treat this function as unknown territory. Discover what it does by probing broadly.

framing-find-combos.description: Prompt framing: argument combination search instruction

overrides.instruction_fragment: Your goal is to find valid argument combinations. Try every plausible input type.

vocab-ids-first.description: Vocab ordering: static IDs listed before other context

vocab-ids-last.description: Vocab ordering: static IDs listed after other context

vocab-ids-omit.description: Vocab ordering: static IDs omitted entirely

density-full.description: Context density: full prior findings injected (current default)

density-minimal.description: Context density: only current-stage facts, no prior run findings

density-none.description: Context density: no prior context at all (cold start per function)

budget-8.description: Tool budget: max 8 tool calls per function

budget-16.description: Tool budget: max 16 tool calls (current default)
